arts.ttl: Real Madrid crisis goes from bad to worse
arts.sum: Yet more Real Madrid stars suffered untimely injuries in the clash with Osasuna on Saturday. Real Madrid can now only hope that the injuries suffered by Rodrygo and Militao, in particular, are not as serious as they looked at first glance.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham Finally Scores First Goal of the Season
arts.sum: A relieved Jude Bellingham scored his first goal of the season to double Real Madrid's lead against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Rodri breaks silence on Real Madrid stars boycotting Man City star's Ballon d'Or moment
arts.sum: Not a single player, coach or official from Real Madrid attended the Ballon d'Or ceremony after learning that star player Vinicius Junior wouldn't be winning the award

arts.ttl: Rodrygo, Militão add to Madrid injury crisis
arts.sum: Real Madrid's injury crisis deepened as Éder Militão and Rodrygo Goes both had to be substituted during the first half of their LaLiga game with Osasuna on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid dealt huge injury blows in chaotic first half against Osasuna
arts.sum: Real Madrid's 2-0 lead over Osasuna at the half-time interval was rendered insignificant by a couple of serious-looking injuries.

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Levante Badalona vs. Real Madrid; Liga F
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Misa, Olga, Rocio, Lakrar, Antonia S., Teresa, Leupolz, Møller, Linda C., Redondo, Eva Navarro This is Antonia’s first start in Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid crisis mounts as defender stretchered off with potentially serious knee injury
arts.sum: The injury situation at La Liga champions Real Madrid has on Saturday taken another turn for the worse. This comes after a key member of the club’s defensive ranks was…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappe considering quitting France team after Deschamps snub?
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappe is reportedly considering quitting the France national team after being omitted from the squad for their upcoming internationals.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star limps out of Osasuna clash in tears
arts.sum: La Liga champions Real Madrid have on Saturday been dealt a fresh blow on the personnel front. This comes after Rodrygo was forced into a premature departure from the club’s…

arts.ttl: When was the last time Real Madrid lost three games in a row?
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been the dominant force in the Champions League for the last decade but Carlo Ancelotti’s team haven’t been having things all their own way of late, suffering back-to-back defeats at the Estadio Santiago Bernabéu to bitter rivals Barcelona in El Clásico and AC Milan in the UCL. There days later, they then suffered another defeat to Barça in the capital, with Ivan Rakitic scoring the only goal of the LaLiga clash as they went on to win the title and finish 19 points clear of Los Blancos.
